targets.boundary: for our operations and data centers
targets.notes: We commit to procure renewable energy from sources that create additionality when available and commercially reasonable.
targets.title: Scope 1 and 2: 100% renewable electricity by FY25

targets.notes: With the goal of effecting supplier adoption of science-based targets aligned with limiting temperature rise to 1.5 degrees Celsius.
targets.title: Scope 3: Engage suppliers covering 67% of Category 1 by FY26
targets.unit: % of NVIDIA’s scope 3 category 1 GHG emissions
